narrative:
Precinct Wren (precinct in Van Wert County) has 387 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.6 percentage points.
